merges.pr_title: fix(f-dashboard): restore GitHub OAuth login (cms_auth_url config)
merges.summary_vi: `cms_auth_url` was accidentally placed under `[extra.giscus]` in `config.toml`, so `config.extra.cms_auth_url` was empty → **meta `zola-cms-auth-api` never rendered** on F-Dashboard (and CMS). F-Dashboard showed "Backend

merges.pr_title: fix(ci): unblock bot PR workflows without manual approval
